title: GoodWorkflows pipeline parameters
description: DSL2 Nextflow pipeline for composing reusable single-cell RNA-seq workflows on SLURM + Podman HPC systems.

input_output_options.title: Input / output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input and where to store output.

workflow.help_text: Select one of the supported saved workflows. Some require GPU/SLURM; others run locally (CPU).

input.description: Path to the samplesheet CSV file. Must contain columns sample_id, output_file_id, and species.

outdir.description: Directory where published results are written.

labkey_options.title: LabKey / Prime-seq options
labkey_options.description: Connection details for the LabKey / Prime-seq server that hosts Seurat objects and cell metadata.

labkey_base_url.description: Base URL of the LabKey server (e.g. https://labkey.example.org).

species_options.title: Species options
species_options.description: Control how multi-species data are ordered and harmonized.

species_order.description: Comma-separated list of species. Controls the order used during cross-species harmonization and scMODAL integration.
species_order.help_text: Each entry must match the 'species' column values in the samplesheet. Only species present in both the samplesheet and this list are integrated.

export_assay.description: Seurat assay name to export as 10x-like count matrix in EXPORT_COUNTS.

tabulation_options.title: Tabulation options
tabulation_options.description: Controls how cell-level metadata is aggregated into the subject-level summary table.

tabulate_id_cols.description: Comma-separated list of subject-level identity columns to carry through to subjectIdTable.csv. cDNA_ID is always included.

tabulate_celltype_cols.description: Extra cell-type columns to tabulate in addition to the standard RIRA columns (RIRA_Immune.cellclass, RIRA_TNK_v2.cellclass, RIRA_Myeloid_v3.cellclass), which are always processed when present.

tabulate_parent_col.description: Parent column used to subset child cell-type columns. Defaults to RIRA_Immune.cellclass when empty.

tabulate_celltype_parent_map.description: Comma-separated celltype_col:parentValue pairs that extend or override the built-in hierarchy (e.g. RIRA_TNK_v2.cellclass:TNK,RIRA_Myeloid_v3.cellclass:Myeloid).

scmodal_options.title: scMODAL integration options
scmodal_options.description: Hyperparameters for the SCMODAL_INTEGRATE step of the full pipeline. Only relevant when --workflow full.

scmodal_container.description: Container image used for GENE_HARMONIZE and SCMODAL_INTEGRATE. Must include scmodal, torch, scanpy, and anndata.

scmodal_latent.description: Dimensionality of the latent embedding produced by scMODAL.

scmodal_training_steps.description: Number of training steps for the scMODAL VAE.

scmodal_neighbors.description: Number of nearest neighbours used when building the KNN graph after integration.

leiden_resolution.description: Leiden clustering resolution applied to the scMODAL latent graph.

scmodal_use_cpu.description: CI-only flag. Bypasses the local-executor GPU guard and runs SCMODAL_INTEGRATE as a stub. Intended for GitHub Actions smoke tests only. Produces no scientifically valid output.

batch_assessment_options.title: Batch effect assessment options
batch_assessment_options.description: Post-integration batch-mixing metrics (GoodWorkflows base image + on-the-fly uvr installs).

goodworkflows_container.description: Base image with uv, uvr, R, and Rust. Assessment processes install scIntegrationMetrics and kBET into a transient uvr project per task.

batch_assessment_default_methods.description: Default integration_assessment_methods when the samplesheet column is empty. kBET is opt-in per row.

batch_assessment_min_cells_per_batch.description: Minimum cells required in every batch label before assessment proceeds.

batch_assessment_kbet_cells_per_batch.description: Stratified downsample target per batch before kBET (re-PCA on downsampled object).
